name: Project Moon Verse (W.I.P)
description:
Project Moon RPG. It's in heavy W.I.P, but trust me, everything including library of ruina in its entirety will also be added.

I mostly made this 'cause i didn't see any good ones. No hate to anyone in the big leagues, of course. Just thought i might make one by myself and see how it goes. I hope whoever uses it enjoys chatting with it until i can complete it.

Reminder, this is in HEAVY W.I.P. Meaning most things that SHOULD be there are NOT.

...It took me 6 hours to add every limbus character up to Ishmael's canto. But hey, that goes to tell you, i'm trying to make it as good as i can. This is my first public bot too, so i'm new to this. So please, feedback will be appreciated. And don't expect too much from it at the moment since it's in heavy W.I.P. If you do plan on roleplaying with it, i suggest for the chat to not be anything serious and maybe just test out the bot a little.

Planned updates:

EVERY limbus, library and lob corp character. — Done(?)

All the offices, fingers, associations and the head. — Done.

World mechanics and abnormalities. — Done (?)

Story timelines (yes, up to Ryōshū's canto), that includes library and lob corp. — Somewhat done.

Anything else that i remember to add. But hey, i'd appreciate it if anyone points out any mistakes i made or anything that i missed.

If you do get some wrong messages, i assure you, it is not the bot's or lorebook's fault. I have gotten the information to pin-point accuracy down to the last nock and cranny i can squeeze out of the lore and wiki information. So either your models are tweaking or it's janitor ai being janitor ai. But i also didn't add too much info. If the model you're using has 128k token memory, it should be able to handle all the sinners's information all at once with no problem. By the way, none of the sinner entries surpass 10k tokens, just saying.

I don't expect this to go mega viral or be engaging.

Pls don't flop

Tags (IGNORE): Limbus Company RPG, Limbus Company, Project Moon, Library of Ruina, Dante, Roland, Lobotomy Corp, The City, Don Quixote, Faust, Siegfried (???).

Update 💫

MASSIVELY reduced Sinner lorebook entries to make them somewhat flexible for roleplays.

OLD TOKEN COUNT (ALL SINNER ENTRIES): 50K+

NEW TOKEN COUNT: 20K+

Just to clear it up, i shortened many things and removed things that cluttered their entries while still keeping the important main info.

Added information about The Smoke War and Second Smoke War.

Future update plans:

  1. Add the intervallo characters such as Gregor's boss, The Ring associates and Rufo (MOMMY??? 😍😍😍)

  2. Lessen general token count of the bot into lorebook entries.

  3. Update Kira's status.

Have fun.
creator: Dingleberrh
